creator: ryan@sasknow.com
text:
I'll take over the mirror port. (Currently maintained by ports@FreeBSD.org).

Also change:
 o Add and test additional MASTER_SITES and PATCH_SITES in Makefile,
   from master list at sunsite.org.uk
 o Remove duplicate MD5 sum in distinfo for ftp.pl_wupatch
 o pkg-descr to fix typos and add WWW: url

No PORTREVISION bump is required for these changes.

Fix: cd /usr/ports/ftp
patch -E <this-file
find mirror -name "*.orig" -delete

How-To-Repeat: n/a
